risk: Pattern 'Mutation consuming 99% of entropy budget' cleared all rules with margin 0.010 < 0.05
proposed_rule: Tighten 'entropy_budget' threshold or add pre-condition guard for pattern 'near_entropy_ceiling'

risk: Pattern 'Mutation importing an allowed stdlib module via an alias chain' cleared all rules with margin 0.030 < 0.05
proposed_rule: Tighten 'sandbox_isolation' threshold or add pre-condition guard for pattern 'stdlib_alias_import'

risk: Pattern 'Two structurally identical mutations with same fitness score' cleared all rules with margin 0.020 < 0.05
proposed_rule: Tighten 'fitness_score_tie' threshold or add pre-condition guard for pattern 'fitness_tie_break_determinism'

risk: Pattern 'Mutation at max lineage depth (parent chain at constitutional cap)' cleared all rules with margin 0.040 < 0.05
proposed_rule: Tighten 'lineage_depth_ceiling' threshold or add pre-condition guard for pattern 'lineage_at_depth_cap'

risk: Pattern 'Exception token with 1-second TTL — should expire before gate check' cleared all rules with margin 0.010 < 0.05
proposed_rule: Tighten 'exception_token_ttl' threshold or add pre-condition guard for pattern 'exception_token_near_expiry'

risk: Pattern 'Mutation landing on exact threshold of 3 independent rules simultaneously' cleared all rules with margin 0.020 < 0.05
proposed_rule: Tighten 'multi_rule_boundary' threshold or add pre-condition guard for pattern 'triple_rule_boundary_coincidence'

risk: Pattern 'Two proposals with distinct content but same GovernanceGate hash prefix' cleared all rules with margin 0.010 < 0.05
proposed_rule: Tighten 'governance_gate_hash_collision' threshold or add pre-condition guard for pattern 'gate_hash_prefix_collision'

risk: Pattern 'Mutation that makes sandbox preflight time out but not hard-fail' cleared all rules with margin 0.030 < 0.05
proposed_rule: Tighten 'sandbox_preflight_timeout' threshold or add pre-condition guard for pattern 'sandbox_preflight_near_timeout'
